untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) detection of 'candles of rest' (3-4 consecutive candles with minimal movement) — no allowed indicator directly measures candle inactivity or rest periods; (2) identification of 'previous low' or 'round figure support' as dynamic support zones — while pivot points (s1, s2) approximate support, the signal specifically requires historical previous lows and psychologically-rounded figures which require bar lookback or custom level detection not available in the allowed indicator set
translation_notes: Attempted partial mapping: entry uses pivot support (s1) and middle pivot as a rough ranged zone approximation. Exit targets r1 (first resistance) as proxy for 'top of range'. However, the core logic of detecting 3-4 candles of rest at a previous low requires either (a) explicit 'candles_of_rest' indicator or (b) bar indexing (close[1], close[2], close[3], close[4]) which is prohibited. The 'previous low' and 'round figure' detection also requires custom level identification outside the allowed indicators.
